- There are 42 markdown files total, but many are tool docs under .claude/skills and should likely be excluded from user note review.
- User-authored note areas seem mainly 分类/ (9 md), Clippings/ (2 md), wiki/ (20+ scaffold pages), plus HANDOFF.md.
- Existing wiki scaffold is seed-level: wiki/index.md and related index pages with frontmatter; lint report says pages scanned 0.
- Representative user notes show mixed quality:
  * 分类/工具箱.md: large curated list, decent headings but no frontmatter/wikilinks and likely some typo/noise issues.
  * 分类/AIGC.md: short link collection with one malformed markdown link line and mixed internal/external linking.
  * 分类/诗词.md: long quote collection with no headings/frontmatter/links; probably okay as anthology but structurally thin.
  * 分类/指南.md and 分类/叙事.md: extremely sparse notes.
  * Clippings/llm-wiki.md: imported clipping with frontmatter and richer structure.
- Root HANDOFF.md exists; no local .claude/CLAUDE.md in vault root.
